log: --- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 33 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 34/67
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 34/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 130/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 33 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 6 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: -5/67
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
